sqlMap.select: SELECT (Brd_Level + 1) FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (NVL(MAX(Brd_Step) , 0) + 1) FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD ( BRD_UPPER, OWNDEPTID, OWNDEPTNM, OWNERID, OWNERNM, OWNERPOSITION, OWNERCALL, BRD_NM, RESLOCATION, BRD_EXPLAIN, BRD_COMPANY , BRD_ID, BRD_GB, BRD_LEVEL, BRD_STEP, MAKEDATE , ATTACH_SIZE, BRD_GROUP, BRD_URL, BRD_ACCESS, BRD_POSTTERM, BRD_COUNT, BRD_REF, BRD_NM2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_P_ClassGB#, RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptID#), RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptNm#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerID#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerNm#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerPos#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerCall#) , RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_NM#), RTRIM(#v_P_ResLocation#), RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_Explain#), RTRIM(#v_P_CompanyID#), #v_Brd_ID#, '1', RTRIM(#v_Brd_Level#) , RTRIM(#v_Brd_Step#), RTRIM(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')), 20, 'A00', '', RTRIM(#v_P_AccessNoty#), 365, 0, '', RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_NM2#), #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO EZRESOURCE.RESACL ( RESID, DEPT_YN, SDA_YN, MEMBER_NAM, MEMBER_ID, ACCESS_LVL, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_Brd_ID#, 'Y', 'Y', 'everyone', 'everyone', '2', RTRIM(#v_P_CompanyID#), #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO EZRESOURCE.RESACL ( RESID, DEPT_YN, SDA_YN, MEMBER_NAM, MEMBER_ID, ACCESS_LVL, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_Brd_ID#, 'Y', 'Y', RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerNm#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerID#), '1', RTRIM(#v_P_CompanyID#), #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD SET OWNDEPTID = RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptID#), OWNDEPTNM = RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptNm#), OWNERID = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerID#), OWNERNM = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerNm#), OWNERPOSITION = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerPos#), OWNERCALL = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerCall#), BRD_NM = RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_NM#), BRD_ACCESS = RTRIM(#v_P_AccessNoty#), BRD_EXPLAIN = RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_Explain#), BRD_NM2 = RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_NM2#) WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE EZRESOURCE.RESACL SET DEPT_YN = #v_P_Dept_YN#, SDA_YN = #v_P_SDA_YN#, MEMBER_NAM = #v_P_Member_nam#, ACCESS_LVL = #v_P_Access_lvl# WHERE RESID = #v_P_ResID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_P_Member_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZRESOURCE.RESACL ( RESID, DEPT_YN, SDA_YN, MEMBER_NAM, MEMBER_ID, ACCESS_LVL, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( RTRIM(#v_P_ResID#), RTRIM(#v_P_Dept_YN#), RTRIM(#v_P_SDA_YN#),RTRIM(#v_P_Member_nam#), RTRIM(#v_P_Member_ID#), RTRIM(#v_P_Access_lvl#), RTRIM(#v_P_CompanyID#), #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZRESOURCE.RESACL WHERE RESID = #v_P_RESID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_STEP FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_SourceID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT BRD_STEP FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_TargetID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD SET BRD_STEP = #v_SourceStep# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_SourceID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD SET BRD_STEP = #v_TargetStep# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_TargetID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_REF FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT BRD_LEVEL + 1 FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(MAX(BRD_STEP) , 0) + 1 FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD SET BRD_REF = #v_TargetRef#, BRD_LEVEL = #v_TargetLevel#, BRD_STEP = #v_TargetStep#, BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_SourceID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_ID FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD SET BRD_LEVEL = #v_P_TargetLevel# WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD SET BRD_STEP = BRD_STEP - 1 WHERE BRD_UPPER = ( SELECT BRD_UPPER FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# ) AND BRD_STEP > ( SELECT BRD_STEP FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZRESOURCE.TB_SCHEDULE WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE EZRESOURCE.TB_SCHEDULEFILE WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE EZRESOURCE.TB_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE EZRESOURCE.RESACL WHERE RESID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND BRD_GB = u'1' AND BRD_ID IN ( SELECT RESID FROM EZRESOURCE.RESACL WHERE CompanyID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND MEMBER_ID IN ( #v_P_DeptPath# ) AND BRD_ID IN ( SELECT BRD_ID FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND BRD_GB = u'1' )
UNION SELECT RESID FROM EZRESOURCE.RESACL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_P_UserID# AND BRD_ID IN ( SELECT BRD_ID FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND BRD_GB = u'1' ) ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step
SELECT * FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD A WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ParentID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND BRD_GB = u'1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY BRD_STEP
SELECT DEPT_YN , SDA_YN , MEMBER_NAM , MEMBER_ID , ACCESS_LVL FROM EZRESOURCE.RESACL WHERE RESID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #resID# AND Brd_Company = #companyID# AND BRD_GB = '2'
SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM EZRESOURCE.TBLBRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #resID# AND Brd_Company = #companyID# AND BRD_GB = '1'
